category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an embedded scripting language for C++; official ChaiScript site and GitHub README describe ChaiScript as an embedded scripting language designed for C++.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub repository title use ChaiScript; source_facts.name is chaiscript.
docs_sources: Official homepage navigation links to Docs; docs page points to the official Doxygen documentation and getting-started resources; GitHub README also directs users to the website for further documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ChaiScript/ChaiScript; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies embedded scripting for C++; official homepage and GitHub README state C++ integration, header-only usage, type safety, and language support.
